problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: If Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
